hooks.command: VAULT=$(cat ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.vault-path 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$VAULT" ] && echo '=== Recent plugin activity ===' && node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/commonplace log --vault "$VAULT" --tail 60 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt:
A file was just written. Get its path from the hook context (tool_input.file_path). If the path does not contain '/Research/', stop immediately and do nothing.

If it is a Research/ file, read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/agents/wiki-impact-checker.md and follow those instructions. The source to check is the file that was just written.

A file was just written. Get its path from the hook context (tool_input.file_path). If the path does not contain '/Research/', stop immediately and do nothing.

If it is a Research/ file, read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/agents/wiki-cross-domain-linker.md and follow those instructions. The source to check is the file that was just written.
